case_title: JOSE ISAURO CARRERA VS. PRICILIANO "PICHI" VILLALOBOS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRERA, JOSE ISAURO AS TO DEFENDANT VILLALOBOS, PRICILIANO "PICHI" AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PICHI VILLALOBOS CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRERA, JOSE ISAURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLALOBOS, PRICILIANO "PICHI" AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PICHI VILLALOBOS CONSTRUCTION $3,398.61 PRINCIPAL, $6.80 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,610.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
